Loma J. Hobsons'S Petition To Contest The Validity Of The Myrtle King Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Jul-05-2023 Continued To Sep-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Ledgerwood, via Zoom, for Loma Hobson, Petitioner; Barbara Swayzer, in court, in propria persona Respondent.

At the outset, counsel requested that the court order the parties to mediation to facilitate discovery. The parties and the court continued to discuss the matter and confirms that all parties are amenable to participate in pro bono mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Sep-11-2023. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Sep-18-2023. The subject matter is continued to Sep-27-2023 and the Parties are to return on the same date at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Svahlin. Not Reported.

Loma J. Hobsons'S Petition To Contest The Validity Of The Myrtle King Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Continued To Jul-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-22-305516 The estate of the Myrtle King and PTR-22-305732 Matter of the Myrtle King revocable living trust.

Appearance: Gene Benetiz appearing via zoom for Barbara Swayzer (petitioner).
Heather Ledgerwood appearing via zoom for and with Loma Hobson appearing via zoom (petitioner).

Mr. Benitez explained efforts made to locate relatives/heirs and spoke of family relationships/dynamics. The Court noted that there is no response to Mrs. Ledgerwood's petition. Mrs. Swayzer expressed that she does not need a lawyer, her position that she is the beneficiary of the house, her concerns about the expense of hiring an attorney, etc. Mrs. Ledgerwood stated that she is not opposing the petition for probate, spoke of Mrs. King's capacity/lack of capacity, and stated that they are going to proceed with discovery in the trust contest. Mr. Benetiz asked for time to try and persuade Mrs. Swayzer to respond in the trust matter. The Court noted that there are some examiners notes in the trust matter that need to be cleared, stated that it is satisfied with due diligence with the heir search, and that it will provide Mrs. Swayzer time to respond. The Petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is granted. The will dated September 2, 2021 is admitted to probate. Barbara Swayzer is appointed as the executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Status on close of estate is set for July 3, 2024. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. The petition to contest the validity of the Myrtle King revocable living trust is continued to July 05, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Swayzer is directed to file her response on or before June 21, 2023.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Loma J. Hobsons'S Petition To Contest The Validity Of The Myrtle King Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Feb-15-2023 Continued To May-24-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following matters were heard: PES-22-305516 Estate of Myrtle King and PTR-22-305732 The Myrtle King Revocable Living Trust.

Appearances: Gene Benitez appeared by zoom for and with Barbara Swayzer (in court) in the estate matter only.
Barbara Swayzer appeared in propria persona in the trust matter.
Heather Ledgewood appeared by zoom for and with Loma Hobson by zoom.

Mr. Benitez requested that the estate matter not be called with the trust matter stating that he only represents Mrs. Swayzer in the estate, and that the objector has removed her objections in the estate. Mrs. Ledgerwood stated that they are still objecting, that her client is an intestate heir and that her client has standing. The court informed that parties that the matters will be called together because they are interrelated. Mrs. Swayzer stated that she is not going to hire an attorney in the trust matter and indicated that she understands she will get nothing if Mrs. Hobson wins on the trust petition. Discussion was held regarding the notice issue to the paternal relatives, the cost of hiring an heir finder, the cost coming out of the estate, there being no liquid assets in the trust, the court needing to see something tangible with respect to what efforts were made/what steps were taken to locate the paternal potential heirs, etc. Mrs. Ledgerwood confirmed that Mrs. Rosenblatt does not represent Mrs. Swayzer in the trust matter. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary, and the Petition to Contest the Validity of the Trust are continued to May 24, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Loma J. Hobsons'S Petition To Contest The Validity Of The Myrtle King Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Feb-08-2023 Continued To Feb-15-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Heather Ledgerwood appeared by zoom for and with Loma Hobson by zoom.
Barbara Swayzer appeared in propria persona.

Mrs. Swayzer stated that she does not have an attorney for the trust matter. Mrs. Ledgerwood stated that she received a notice from trustee from attorney Erica Rosenblatt, that they have been serving the attorney and asked for clarification as to whether she should be communicating directly with Mrs. Swayzer. Mrs. Swayzer confirmed that Mrs. Rosenblatt does not represent her. Mrs. Ledgerwood informed the court that her client has withdrawn her objections in the estate matter, but that they are moving with the trust contest. Discussion was held regarding the need to determine any potential heirs on the father's side, the need to hire an heir finder to do so, the requirement of providing notice to all potential heirs pursuant to the Probate Code, the issue of whether or not it makes sense to hear the trust matter and the estate together, etc. The Petition to Contest the Validity of the Trust is continued to February 15, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
